title: Treaty of Alliance
description: The Argent Gryphon has formalized diplomatic ties with the Circle of Stonehaze.
body:
Between the Argent Gryphon and the Circle of Stonehaze

We agree with the articles written below. May this alliance be blessed by Banor!
— Nezel Stonehaze, 9 March 2026

Article I — Purpose

This treaty establishes an alliance between the Argent Gryphon and the Circle of Stonehaze.

Article II — Alliance in Arms

Each guild shall aid the other against forces of evil and support one another in such campaigns when able.

Article III — Mutual Aid

Should a member of one guild encounter a member of the other in need of assistance, they shall offer reasonable aid when able.

Article IV — Exchange of Knowledge

Tibian knowledge, as well as the names of murderers and thieves, shall be shared between both guilds.

Article V — Hospitality

Members of each guild may freely enter the guildhall of the other and make use of bed and board.

Article VI — Fellowship

Representatives of both guilds shall meet at least once each quarter to foster friendships and strengthen relations.
